summary: Comprehensive testing completed for user authentication features in Awadhut Banquets & Catering website. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (31/31 tests passed). Frontend user authentication flow working perfectly. All key requirements for user signup/login for reviews implemented and functional.

minor_issues.issue: Booking form elements not found with standard selectors on booking page
Package cards not found with standard selectors on packages page

passed_tests: User registration API (POST /api/auth/register) - 201 status with token
User login API (POST /api/auth/login) - 200 status with token
Admin login with admin@awadhut.com / admin123 - returns admin role token
Review creation without auth returns 401 (authentication required)
Review creation with user auth returns 201, name auto-populated from user
My reviews endpoint (GET /api/reviews/my) returns only current user's reviews
Duplicate registration returns 400 error
Frontend Reviews page shows Login/Sign Up button when not logged in
User registration modal opens and functions correctly
User can register via modal and submit review successfully
Navbar shows Login button initially, then user name after login
User logout functionality working (logout button, login button reappears)
Booking page accessible WITHOUT login (no auth required)
Contact form accessible WITHOUT login (no auth required)
Admin dashboard accessible with admin credentials at /admin/login
Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
All page navigation working (About, Services, Packages, Gallery, Reviews, Contact)
Admin dashboard shows stats and allows navigation to different sections
Review submission shows success message after authentication
All backend CRUD operations working (packages, bookings, reviews, gallery)
Dashboard stats API returning correct counts
Contact form submission working without authentication
Gallery API and listings API working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (31/31 tests passed - all authentication and CRUD operations working)
success_percentage.frontend: 90% (User auth flow perfect, minor selector issues for booking/package forms)
